title: biscutella angustifolia
intro: Biscutella angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved biscutella, is a flowering plant species within the family Brassicaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Biscutella angustifolia has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
